title: Startup full rule consistency scan (R28 consumer)
description: Per D24: serve startup runs full scan of .fabric/rules/ → hash vs meta → auto-repair all diffs → write meta_reconciled_on_startup ledger event. This makes rules added while serve was offline visible immediately on startup; doctor no longer required for first-use freshness.
scope: Layer 2 P0 — R28 consumer at startup

files.change: After startStdioServer initialization (around lines 92-97 area, before signal handler install): await ensureRulesFresh(projectRoot, { mode: 'full' })
On full scan, write ledger event meta_reconciled_on_startup { reconciled_files: [], duration_ms }
NEW: spawn server with rule files added since last meta build; assert meta_reconciled_on_startup event written; assert meta reflects new rules

criteria: Server startup awaits full rule sync before accepting requests
meta_reconciled_on_startup ledger event written with reconciled file list
Test verifies offline-added rules visible after server restart
Startup time impact <500ms for 100-rule project (acceptance threshold)
